data.body:
Scope expansion (2026-04-26, from docs/proposed-mitigations-4-26.md):

Three mitigations absorbed into this epic's specialized authoring sub-agent scope, with the framing clarification that the agent owns BOTH authoring AND review of skill/agent/prompt files:

- **G10-M1 (descriptive-first)** — Add plugins/dso/config/skill-section-manifest.yaml listing required section headings per skill file. Manifest is generated descriptively from current state (no remediation tickets needed at rollout); pre-commit hook check-skill-sections.sh blocks new commits that delete required sections. Normative tightening of the manifest is a follow-up SC, not part of initial rollout.
- **G10-M2 (review overlay)** — Expand this epic to include a specialized skill/agent/prompt review overlay parallel to the existing security/performance/test-quality overlays in /dso:review. The overlay is dispatched when a diff touches plugins/dso/skills/, plugins/dso/agents/, or plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/. The overlay carries skill-specific rubric items (removed MUST/NEVER/dispatch/gate lines, dispatch-pattern correctness, multi-variant template consistency, positional-bias detection) the standard reviewer rubric does not cover.
- **G10-M3** — CLAUDE.md 'Always Do These' rule: edits to plugins/dso/skills/ or plugins/dso/agents/ must originate from a planned task referencing a parent ticket whose description mentions skill modification. Pre-commit hook check-skill-edit-source.sh enforces.

Rationale: the original epic was framed as 'authoring sub-agent.' The expansion adds (a) a mechanical drift-detection check (manifest hook), (b) a complementary review overlay covering the same domain knowledge, and (c) an audit-trail invariant (ticket-sourced edits). Together they cover authoring-time, review-time, and edit-time. Bug class addressed: 027a-ad30 (positional bias), 7899-a46b, b784-fe6e, 3cb1-429e (cited in original epic description), plus skill-content drift more broadly.

This epic has no children yet (scrutiny:pending); decomposition will pick up the expanded SCs naturally. Note: tag scrutiny:pending should be cleared once brainstorm runs on this epic.
